subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-07-29
subcodes.first_line: What captives of superstitions people are! What troubles they endure for the sake of name and fame! What fruit will these superstitions bear?
subcodes.first_line_orig: مردم چه قدر اسیر اوهامند محض شهرت و نام چه زحمتها می کشند این اوهام چه انجا می خواهد داشت جمیع شئون محو و فانی و نابود
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @empty learning; false spirituality, @development of capacity and readiness, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
